response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in software development, leadership, and open-source contributions, aligning well with the Head of Development role. His background includes senior-level positions across diverse tech stacks, project management, and mentorship, though his experience with UML, IT security, and German language proficiency (only basic) are weaker points. His entrepreneurial and open-source initiatives show strategic thinking and technical depth.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and team leadership across multiple tech stacks (Node.js, Dlang, TypeScript, etc.)
Proven track record in open-source development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) and community engagement (workshops, talks)
Strong technical versatility, problem-solving skills, and willingness to learn new technologies (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, MCP)
concerns: Limited direct experience with UML modeling and explicit IT security/architecture compliance (key requirements for the role)
German language proficiency is only basic (C1 required), which may hinder client interactions and internal collaboration
Lack of clear project management experience (e.g., PMP, Agile/Scrum) despite technical project leadership
